'''thahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachscape|beachscape]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachscape|beachscape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thahaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæhækæth|thæhækæth]] || [[word:thæhækæj|thæhækæj]] || [[word:thæhækæsh|thæhækæsh]] || [[word:thæhækæ|thæhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thahahakath|thahahakath]] || [[word:thahahakaj|thahahakaj]] || [[word:thahahakash|thahahakash]] || [[word:thahahaka|thahahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahakath|thahakath]] || [[word:thahakaj|thahakaj]] || [[word:thahakash|thahakash]] || [[word:thahaka|thahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahafkath|thahafkath]] || [[word:thahafkaj|thahafkaj]] || [[word:thahafkash|thahafkash]] || [[word:thahafkaf|thahafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thahakatha|thahakatha]] || [[word:thahakaja|thahakaja]] || [[word:thahakasha|thahakasha]] || [[word:thahakaka|thahakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thahakath|thahakath]] || [[word:thahakaj|thahakaj]] || [[word:thahakash|thahakash]] || [[word:thahaka|thahaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thahakathal|thahakathal]] || [[word:thahakajal|thahakajal]] || [[word:thahakashal|thahakashal]] || [[word:thahakakal|thahakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thahakathatha|thahakathatha]] || [[word:thahakajaja|thahakajaja]] || [[word:thahakashasha|thahakashasha]] || [[word:thahakaka|thahakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thahakathan|thahakathan]] || [[word:thahakajan|thahakajan]] || [[word:thahakashan|thahakashan]] || [[word:thahakakan|thahakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thahakathaoro|thahakathaoro]] || [[word:thahakajaoro|thahakajaoro]] || [[word:thahakashaoro|thahakashaoro]] || [[word:thahakakaoro|thahakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
